items.title: VAR Review: Were refs right to disallow West Ham e...
items.summary: Arsenal took a massive step toward the Premier League title Sunday, but should West Ham's late equalizer been disallowed?

items.title: 'I Don't Feel Fear,' USA's Weston McKennie Embraces World Cup Pressure
items.summary: Weston McKennie has declared that he is ready to transform the immense pressure of a home World Cup into a historic performance for the United States men's national team.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
